prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: reusable game card frame template
Primary request: a premium but restrained dark-fantasy assault card frame for an original game called Blood Rogue, inspired by the clarity of premium deckbuilder cards and the material richness of Monster Train, but much quieter and less busy than ornate gothic frames.
Subject: a single full-face vertical card frame with no card text and no icon subject; the frame itself is the only subject.
Composition/framing: portrait 3:4 card face, centered and symmetrical, designed to sit behind dynamic UI text and illustration. Include a clean narrow title plaque at the top, a clearly defined central art window with generous empty space, a large lower parchment text well, and a subtle footer strip. The frame should support content, not dominate it.
Style/medium: painterly dark-fantasy UI frame art, premium deckbuilder card template.
Lighting/mood: severe and elegant, black iron and worn brass with restrained blood-red accents.
Color palette: black iron, dark bronze, muted ember red, parchment tan, soot brown.
Materials/textures: worn metal trim, subtle engraved edges, lacquered wood or leather backing, clean parchment panel.
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no icons, no characters, no watermark. Keep ornament minimal and pushed toward the outer edges. The art window and text area must remain broad, calm, and highly usable.
Avoid: no spikes, no skull centerpiece, no giant crest, no heavy filigree, no perspective tilt, no busy art in the image window, no copyrighted Monster Train or Diablo elements.

Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: reusable game card frame template
Primary request: a premium but restrained dark-fantasy tactic card frame for an original game called Blood Rogue, inspired by premium deckbuilder cards and the material richness of Monster Train, but much quieter and less busy than ornate gothic frames.
Subject: a single full-face vertical card frame with no card text and no icon subject; the frame itself is the only subject.
Composition/framing: portrait 3:4 card face, centered and symmetrical, designed to sit behind dynamic UI text and illustration. Include a clean narrow title plaque at the top, a clearly defined central art window with generous empty space, a large lower parchment text well, and a subtle footer strip. The frame should support content, not dominate it.
Style/medium: painterly dark-fantasy UI frame art, premium deckbuilder card template.
Lighting/mood: colder and calmer than the assault version, with muted steel, ivory parchment, and very restrained teal-indigo accenting.
Color palette: blackened steel, ash silver, muted teal, dark smoke, parchment ivory.
Materials/textures: etched steel trim, worn lacquer, smooth parchment panel, minimal occult engraving.
Constraints: no text, no numbers, no icons, no characters, no watermark. Keep ornament minimal and pushed to the edges. The art window and text area must remain broad, calm, and highly usable.
Avoid: no spikes, no giant crest, no bright magic gems, no heavy filigree, no perspective tilt, no busy art in the image window, no copyrighted Monster Train or Diablo elements.
